purpose: Walk-forward OOS validation for NLWB (OP-20 disclosure 3)

pdl_relaxed.description: PDL, min_wick=8c, vol=1.0x, consol=0 — the highest-N variant

wr_near_session_low.description: Bounce bar low <= prior session_low * 1.002 (session-low-holding bounce)

wr_ribbon_favorable.description: Ribbon MIXED or BULL at bounce bar (HTF confirmation NOT required)

op16_guard.guard_note: J loser days (2026-05-07, 2026-05-06, 2026-05-05): 0 scanner fires, 0 would-be wins, 0 would-be losses. GUARD: PASS.
op16_guard.edge_note: This is a BULL bounce setup. J's 7 source-of-truth trades are all BEARISH (3 puts + 4 put/call losers). OP-16 edge_capture for a BULL setup is measured differently: does the setup fire correctly (bull) on J's loser days (which were already bear entries)? If BULL bounce fires on 5/05-5/07, those are CONFLICTING trades (SPY was not bouncing on those days). Guard check: does the scanner fire on 5/05, 5/06, 5/07? If yes => CONFLICT flags. If no => COMPLEMENT (does not add risk on loser days). Formal edge_capture for a bull-setup using J's bears is N/A per OP-16 design, but we compute: sum(bull_wins_on_J_winner_days) - sum(bull_losses_on_J_loser_days) as a compatibility score.

overall.promotion_path: BLOCKED — OOS degradation detected, investigate before promotion
notes: Walk-forward split validates in-sample WR doesn't degrade OOS.
STABLE = WR delta < 10pp AND loser-day guard PASS AND no month < 45% WR (N>=3).
After OOS + real-fills: accumulate 3+ live J confirmations before promotion.
